summary: Made two surgical continuity edits: one to tie the opening more cleanly to Chapter 10's overnight rain, and one to sharpen the handoff into Chapter 12's June-facing investigation beat.
edits: Anchored the opening paragraph to the prior chapter's rainy night without changing the chapter's tactile shop-floor entry.
Adjusted the final sentence so Lena's note-taking more directly hands off to her next-scene collaboration with June.
